course_title: Redis Internals & Production Systems with Go

days.title: Why Redis Exists – In-Memory Data Structures as a Service
days.real_life_example: Twitter uses Redis to cache timelines and reduce database load under massive read traffic.
theory_deep_dive: Why databases alone are insufficient at scale
Redis as a data structure server, not just a cache
days.hands_on_goal: Run Redis locally and validate sub-millisecond operations

days.title: Redis Data Structures – Choosing the Right Weapon
days.real_life_example: Instagram uses sorted sets for feeds and rankings.
theory_deep_dive: Strings, Lists, Sets, Hashes, Sorted Sets
Why wrong data structure choices kill performance
bash: redis-cli HSET user:1 age 30 city Delhi
days.hands_on_goal: Model the same data using multiple Redis structures and compare behavior

days.title: Redis Memory Model & Eviction Policies
days.real_life_example: Ad tech platforms rely on Redis eviction policies to prevent cache stampedes.
theory_deep_dive: LRU vs LFU vs volatile policies
days.hands_on_goal: Force eviction and observe key survival patterns

days.title: Redis Persistence – RDB vs AOF vs Reality
days.real_life_example: Session stores prefer speed over durability; financial counters do not.
days.hands_on_goal: Crash Redis and verify data recovery behavior

days.title: Redis as a Cache – Patterns & Pitfalls
days.real_life_example: E-commerce sites cache product pages to survive flash sales.
days.hands_on_goal: Implement cache-aside pattern safely in Go

days.title: Redis for Rate Limiting
days.real_life_example: APIs use Redis to enforce per-user request limits.
days.go_code:
script := redis.NewScript(`
local current = redis.call('INCR', KEYS[1])
if current == 1 then redis.call('EXPIRE', KEYS[1], ARGV[1]) end
return current
`)
days.hands_on_goal: Build atomic rate limiter using Lua

days.title: Redis Transactions & Lua Scripting
days.real_life_example: Gaming systems update scores atomically using Lua.
days.hands_on_goal: Replace MULTI with Lua for atomic updates

days.title: Redis Pub/Sub vs Streams
days.real_life_example: Chat systems use Pub/Sub; event systems use Streams.
bash: redis-cli XADD events * type login user 1
days.hands_on_goal: Build a basic stream consumer group

days.title: Redis for Queues & Background Jobs
days.real_life_example: Sidekiq uses Redis lists for background job processing.

days.title: Distributed Locks with Redis
days.real_life_example: Cron jobs use Redis locks to avoid duplicate execution.
readings: Martin Kleppmann – 'How to Do Distributed Locking'
days.hands_on_goal: Implement safe lock with expiry and ownership

days.title: Redis Replication & High Availability
days.real_life_example: Session stores require replicas to survive node loss.
days.hands_on_goal: Simulate master failure and observe failover

days.title: Redis Cluster & Sharding
days.real_life_example: Large-scale caches shard data across Redis Cluster.
days.hands_on_goal: Understand key hashing and slot placement

days.title: Performance Tuning & Monitoring
days.real_life_example: High latency spikes indicate slow Lua scripts.
days.hands_on_goal: Identify and fix slow Redis operations

days.title: Capstone – Redis in a Real System
days.real_life_example: E-commerce backend using Redis for cache, rate limits, locks, and queues.
